scripts.lint: oxlint --fix -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.lint:check: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.release:public:publish: bun run build:public-packages && bun scripts/publish-public-packages.ts --tag next
scripts.release:public:publish:latest: bun run build:public-packages && bun scripts/publish-public-packages.ts --tag latest
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:integration:contract && bun run test:integration:implementation
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/unit/client-sync-reset.test.ts && bun test tests/unit/perf-lab-pglite.test.ts && bun test tests/unit/web-pglite.test.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 tests/unit/client-schema.test.ts tests/unit/concurrent-mutation-mix.test.ts tests/unit/contracts-supabase-rls.test.ts tests/unit/contracts.test.ts tests/unit/demo-rls-schema.test.ts tests/unit/electric-proxy.test.ts tests/unit/overlay-state.test.ts tests/unit/perf-lab-schema.test.ts tests/unit/perf-scenario.test.ts tests/unit/pglite-sync-apply.test.ts tests/unit/plpgsql-strategy.test.ts tests/unit/row-expectations.test.ts tests/unit/sync-engine.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p apps/perf-lab/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: bun run guard:tmp-files && bun run format && bun run format:check && bun run lint:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
